motion_system: paper edges seem lifted by a slow indoor draft; gill-like seams and street-line traces guide the eye without animation
color_drift: oxidized ivory and mushroom gray drift into sepia, moss green, smoke brown, with small strawberry-red and tarnished-gold punctures
glow_behavior: mostly matte archive light, with restrained glossy glints in embedded media slivers and varnished torn apertures
